case_title: OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS vs. BULLOCK, YOLANDA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS SERVED OCT-24-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, YOLANDA

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $134.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, YOLANDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BULLOCK, YOLANDA $1,748.62 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,206.62
